# {data-menu-title="QR Code"}

::: {layout="[55,45]"}

::: {.cell}

<img src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?data=https://paddyroddy.github.io/talks/{{< meta slug >}}&bgcolor=000000&color=ffffff&size=550x550" alt="QR code linking to this talk's web page" style="display:block;margin:auto;width:550px;"/>

:::

::: {.cell}

<https://paddyroddy.github.io/talks>

:::

:::
